label: Race properties
description: Pawn race definition covering biology, AI, diet, trainability, life stages, sound, and reproduction.

fleshType.label: Flesh type
fleshType.description: FleshTypeDef controlling damage flavor text, bleed appearance, and butcher audio.

body.label: Body
body.description: BodyDef defining the pawn's anatomy for injury and surgery calculations.

baseBodySize.label: Base body size
baseBodySize.description: Base body size used for carry capacity, hit chance, and crowd calculations.

baseHealthScale.label: Base health scale
baseHealthScale.description: Multiplier on all body part max hit points.

baseHungerRate.label: Base hunger rate
baseHungerRate.description: Nutrition consumed per day at normal activity.

foodType.label: Food type
foodType.description: FoodTypeFlags value listing accepted food categories (comma-separated flags).

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.description: Cognitive tier controlling social interactions, work eligibility, and backstory.

trainability.label: Trainability
trainability.description: TrainabilityDef controlling which training assignments are available for this animal.

lifeStageAges.label: Life stage ages
lifeStageAges.description: Ordered list of LifeStageAge entries defining growth stages and their onset ages.

lifeStageWorkSettings.label: Life stage work settings
lifeStageWorkSettings.description: Minimum biological ages for work types at this life stage. Child element names are WorkTypeDef defNames; text is the minimum age in years.

gestationPeriodDays.label: Gestation period days
gestationPeriodDays.description: Days of pregnancy before offspring are born.

hasGenders.label: Has genders
hasGenders.description: Whether individuals of this race are assigned a biological sex.

wildness.label: Wildness
wildness.description: Difficulty of taming (0 = completely docile, 1 = untameable by normal means).

petness.label: Petness
petness.description: How much colonists value this animal as a pet for mood purposes.

manhunterOnDamageChance.label: Manhunter on damage chance
manhunterOnDamageChance.description: Probability (0–1) this animal goes manhunter when damaged.

manhunterOnTameFailChance.label: Manhunter on tame fail chance
manhunterOnTameFailChance.description: Probability (0–1) this animal goes manhunter when a taming attempt fails.

nuzzleMtbHours.label: Nuzzle mean-time-between (hours)
nuzzleMtbHours.description: Average hours between spontaneous nuzzle interactions with colonists. -1 disables nuzzling.

nameOnTameChance.label: Name on tame chance
nameOnTameChance.description: Probability (0–1) the animal receives a name when tamed.

nameGenerator.label: Name generator
nameGenerator.description: RulePackDef used to generate male animal names.

nameGeneratorFemale.label: Name generator (female)
nameGeneratorFemale.description: RulePackDef used to generate female animal names.

predator.label: Predator
predator.description: If true, this animal hunts prey and can be set to hunt colonists when manhunting.

maxPreyBodySize.label: Max prey body size
maxPreyBodySize.description: Maximum body size of prey this predator will hunt.

prey.label: Prey
prey.description: If true, predators will hunt this animal.

packAnimal.label: Pack animal
packAnimal.description: If true, this animal can carry caravan gear.

herdAnimal.label: Herd animal
herdAnimal.description: If true, this animal congregates in herds on the world map.

herdMigrationAllowed.label: Herd migration allowed
herdMigrationAllowed.description: Whether herds of this animal can pass through the local tile as a migration event.

needsRest.label: Needs rest
needsRest.description: If true, this pawn has a rest need and will seek sleep.

hediffGiverSets.label: Hediff giver sets
hediffGiverSets.description: HediffGiverSetDef references for disease and illness packages applied to this race.

renderTree.label: Render tree
renderTree.description: PawnRenderTreeDef defining the recursive render-node tree used to draw this race.

thinkTreeMainKind.label: Think tree (main)
thinkTreeMainKind.description: ThinkTreeDef for the primary AI decision-making loop.

thinkTreeConstantKind.label: Think tree (constant)
thinkTreeConstantKind.description: ThinkTreeDef for always-active AI sub-goals evaluated every tick.

corpseDef.label: Corpse def
corpseDef.description: ThingDef spawned when this pawn dies.

bloodDef.label: Blood def
bloodDef.description: ThingDef spawned as blood filth when this pawn bleeds. Private in source.

bloodSmearDef.label: Blood smear def
bloodSmearDef.description: ThingDef spawned as blood smear filth when this pawn is dragged. Private in source.

leatherDef.label: Leather def
leatherDef.description: ThingDef produced as leather when this pawn is butchered.

meatDef.label: Meat def
meatDef.description: ThingDef produced as meat when this pawn is butchered.

shadowData.label: Shadow data
shadowData.description: Shadow shape and offset drawn beneath this pawn.

specialShadowData.label: Special shadow data
specialShadowData.description: Override shadow used in certain special render contexts.

soundMeleeHitPawn.label: Sound melee hit pawn
soundMeleeHitPawn.description: SoundDef played when this pawn strikes another pawn in melee.

soundMeleeHitBuilding.label: Sound melee hit building
soundMeleeHitBuilding.description: SoundDef played when this pawn strikes a building in melee.

soundMeleeMiss.label: Sound melee miss
soundMeleeMiss.description: SoundDef played when this pawn misses a melee attack.

soundDeath.label: Sound death
soundDeath.description: SoundDef played when this pawn dies.

soundAngry.label: Sound angry
soundAngry.description: SoundDef played when this animal becomes aggressive.

soundWounded.label: Sound wounded
soundWounded.description: SoundDef played when this pawn is injured.

soundCalm.label: Sound calm
soundCalm.description: SoundDef played when this animal is calm and idle.

soundCall.label: Sound call
soundCall.description: SoundDef played when this animal calls to other animals.

thumbnailColor.label: Thumbnail color
thumbnailColor.description: RGBA tint used for this race's background thumbnail in the wildlife tab.

headPosPerRotation.label: Head position per rotation
headPosPerRotation.description: List of Vector3 offsets (one per rotation direction: N/E/S/W) for head position in the pawn render.
